iam-root-account-used-recently.rationale: The root account has unrestricted access to all AWS services.
iam-root-account-used-recently.remediation: Avoid using the root account for day-to-day operations.

iam-user-no-mfa.description: IAM user has no MFA device
iam-user-no-mfa.rationale: MFA provides an additional layer of protection.
iam-user-no-mfa.remediation: Enable MFA for all IAM users with console access.

s3-bucket-publicly-readable.rationale: Publicly readable buckets expose sensitive data.
s3-bucket-publicly-readable.remediation: Remove public ACLs and enable S3 Block Public Access.
